title: How to Play ZXPong
seoTitle: How to Play ZXPong | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to play ZXPong, master paddle control, build longer rallies, and compete in Solo Play and World PVP.
summary: Discover the basics of ZXPong and learn how to improve your reactions, timing, and rally skills.

sections.heading: Your Objective
paragraphs: Defend your side of the court, return the ball, and keep the rally going for as long as possible.
The longer you keep the ball in play, the more exciting every match becomes as you improve your timing, reactions, and positioning.

sections.heading: How a Match Works
paragraphs: Choose your preferred game mode, wait for the match countdown, and get ready for fast-paced arcade action.
After every match you can review your performance, earn BarkinMad Coins, unlock achievements, and jump straight into another game.
bullets: Choose Solo Play to practise against AI opponents.
Choose World PVP to compete against players around the world.
Keep the rally alive by staying in position and reacting early.

sections.heading: Build Longer Rallies
paragraphs: Every successful return extends the rally and increases the challenge. Staying calm, reading the ball early, and positioning your paddle correctly will help you stay in control.
Long rallies not only improve your skills but also help you compete for the Longest Rally leaderboard.

images.caption: Master the basics before taking on tougher opponents.

featureShowcases.heading: Start Your First Match
featureShowcases.summary: Everything you need to begin playing ZXPong with confidence.
body: ZXPong is easy to learn but rewarding to master. Begin by practising your paddle movement, returning the ball consistently, and building longer rallies.
As your confidence grows, you'll unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete against players around the world.

image.caption: Everything you need to begin your ZXPong journey.
